title: Association for Computing Machinery (ACM)
shortDesc: International computing society empowering computer scientists with technical lectures, coding competitions, and research.
longDesc: The ACM Student Chapter under MCA at Chandigarh University is affiliated with the world’s largest educational and scientific computing society. It organizes competitive programming sprints, open-source workshops, research paper seminars, and expert guest lectures by computing leaders.

title: Association for Computing Machinery-Women (ACMW)
shortDesc: Supporting, celebrating, and advocating for women in computing through mentorship, bootcamps, and tech talks.
longDesc: ACM-W Student Chapter under BCA supports and empowers female tech leaders in computing. The chapter provides specialized coding bootcamps, technical career mentorship, hackathons, and guest lectures to bridge the gender gap in tech.

title: AESI Professional Society
shortDesc: Aeronautical Society of India chapter advancing aerospace sciences, propulsion, and rocket design.
longDesc: The AESI Student Chapter under Aerospace Engineering connects students with national aeronautical experts. Activities include drone building workshops, rocket propulsion seminars, aircraft safety simulations, and aerospace paper competitions.

title: ASCE STUDENT CHAPTER CHANDIGARH UNIVERSITY
shortDesc: American Society of Civil Engineers chapter promoting structural engineering excellence and infrastructure design.
longDesc: The ASCE Student Chapter under Civil Engineering provides national exposure through concrete canoe competitions, steel bridge design challenges, structural analysis workshops, and sustainable infrastructure symposiums.

title: ASHRAE
shortDesc: American Society of Heating, Refrigerating & Air-Conditioning Engineers promoting HVAC&R and green building design.
longDesc: The ASHRAE Student Chapter under Mechanical Engineering focuses on thermal comfort, refrigeration technology, indoor air quality standards, and energy-efficient HVAC building systems.

title: ASME
shortDesc: American Society of Mechanical Engineers promoting CAD design, robotics, and mechanical engineering standards.
longDesc: The ASME Student Chapter under Mechanical Engineering engages students in mechanical design competitions, human-powered vehicle challenges, CAD 3D modeling workshops, and thermal-fluids research.

title: INDIAN INSTITUTE OF CHEMICAL ENGG.
shortDesc: IIChE chapter advancing chemical process safety, green chemistry, and industrial plant innovations.
longDesc: The IIChE Student Chapter under Chemical Engineering focuses on industrial chemical processing, safety protocols, environmental remediation, green reaction kinetics, and chemical plant simulations.

title: IEI
shortDesc: Institution of Engineers (India) chapter fostering multi-disciplinary engineering excellence and technical research.
longDesc: The IEI Mechanical Chapter promotes professional engineering ethics, interdisciplinary technical paper presentations, industrial site visits, and national engineering symposiums.

title: CSI
shortDesc: Computer Society of India chapter aligning IT education with industry requirements and software engineering.
longDesc: The CSI Student Chapter under CSE 4th Year connects computing students with IT industry standards, professional certifications, hackathons, and enterprise software engineering workshops.

title: IDC
shortDesc: Institution's Innovation Council / Developer Club driving startup culture, patents, and technical prototype builds.
longDesc: IDC Student Chapter under CSE 4th Year acts as a technological catalyst, guiding students through startup incubation, patent registration, product design thinking, and working prototype development.

title: GFG
shortDesc: GeeksforGeeks Student Chapter focusing on Data Structures, Algorithms, and interview preparation.
longDesc: The GFG Student Chapter under CSE 4th Year is a dedicated competitive coding community conducting weekly DSA problem-solving sessions, interview prep bootcamps, and algorithmic contests.

title: IETE
shortDesc: Institution of Electronics & Telecommunication Engineers chapter specializing in IoT, wireless, and embedded systems.
longDesc: The IETE Chapter under CSE 4th Year focuses on telecommunication technologies, signal processing, IoT hardware integration, microcontrollers, and wireless sensor network projects.

title: IEEE COMPUTER SOCIETY
shortDesc: World's leading computer technical society advancing AI, cloud computing, cybersecurity, and software engineering.
longDesc: The IEEE Computer Society Chapter under CSE 2nd Year connects students to global IEEE technical networks. It conducts hands-on workshops in artificial intelligence, cybersecurity, cloud architecture, and open-source software.

title: ISTE
shortDesc: Indian Society for Technical Education chapter promoting skill development and innovative learning.
longDesc: The ISTE Chapter under CSE 3rd Year promotes technical skill enhancement, faculty-student interactive seminars, technical quizzes, and instructional technology workshops.

title: IEEE COMMUNICATION SOCIETY
shortDesc: Advancing 5G/6G networks, wireless protocols, optical communication, and signal processing.
longDesc: The IEEE ComSoc Chapter under CSE 3rd Year delves into mobile communication networks, 5G architectures, optical signal processing, information theory, and network security protocols.

title: IEEE CONSUMER TECHNOLOGY SOCIETY
shortDesc: Consumer electronics, smart home automation, wearable devices, and IoT hardware engineering.
longDesc: The IEEE CTSoc Chapter under CSE 2nd Year explores user-facing technologies including smart home systems, wearable fitness gadgets, consumer IoT devices, and interactive UI/UX hardware.

title: IEEE POWER AND ENERGY SOCIETY
shortDesc: Clean energy grids, smart grid technologies, electric vehicles, and power electronic systems.
longDesc: The IEEE PES Chapter under CSE 2nd Year focuses on renewable energy integration, smart electric grid management, electric vehicle charging infrastructure, and high-efficiency power electronics.

title: ADC
shortDesc: App Developer Community specializing in Android, iOS, Flutter, React Native, and mobile backends.
longDesc: ADC under CSE 4th Year is a practical mobile application development chapter. Members learn native Android (Kotlin), iOS (Swift), cross-platform Flutter/React Native, and cloud API backend integrations.

title: IEI CSE
shortDesc: Institution of Engineers (India) CSE chapter focusing on software standards and industrial research.
longDesc: The IEI CSE Chapter under CSE 3rd Year nurtures software engineering standards, technical paper publishing, industrial automation software, and collaborative code reviews.

title: IEEE SOCIETY ON SOCIAL IMPLICATIONS OF TECHNOLOGY
category: Social Impact & Community Development & Community Development
shortDesc: Analyzing the ethical, social, environmental, and humanitarian impact of technology on society.
longDesc: IEEE SSIT Chapter under Engineering Foundation 1 focuses on tech ethics, AI bias, environmental sustainability, digital privacy, and human-centric engineering solutions.

title: IEEE WOMEN IN ENGINEERING AFFINITY GROUP
shortDesc: Inspiring and mentoring female engineers and scientists in STEM leadership and technical careers.
longDesc: IEEE WIE Affinity Group under Engineering Foundation encourages female students in engineering and science fields through career mentorship, technical achievement awards, leadership summits, and STEM outreach.

title: CodeChef Cu Chapter
shortDesc: Competitive programming community hosting monthly coding contests and algorithmic problem solving.
longDesc: CodeChef CU Chapter under AIT-CSE cultivates a vibrant competitive coding culture. The chapter conducts monthly rated coding contests, data structure workshops, and interview problem breakdowns.

title: IEEE COMPUTATIONAL INTELLIGENCE SOCIETY
shortDesc: Neural networks, evolutionary algorithms, fuzzy systems, and deep learning research.
longDesc: IEEE CIS Chapter under ME-CSE explores biologically inspired computational paradigms, deep neural networks, swarm intelligence, fuzzy logic controllers, and reinforcement learning.

title: IEEE ROBOTICS AND AUTOMATION SOCIETY
shortDesc: Autonomous robotics, computer vision, kinematic control, and industrial automation systems.
longDesc: IEEE RAS Chapter under ME-CSE focuses on robotic manipulator kinematics, ROS (Robot Operating System), computer vision object tracking, autonomous drone navigation, and industrial automation.

title: IEEE CHANDIGARH UNIVERSITY STUDENT BRANCH
shortDesc: Parent IEEE student branch coordinating multi-track international conferences and technical summits.
longDesc: IEEE CU Student Branch is the umbrella IEEE organization at Chandigarh University. It coordinates international technical conferences, multi-track symposiums, membership drives, and global IEEE network connects.

title: Standards Club
shortDesc: Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) chapter promoting quality control, testing, and industrial safety.
longDesc: Standards Club under Engineering Foundation 5 educates students on quality assurance, Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) protocols, material testing compliance, and industrial product standardization.

title: ASHARE STUDENT CHAPTER
shortDesc: Promoting sustainable architectural climate control, energy efficiency, and indoor environmental quality.
longDesc: ASHRAE Architecture Chapter focuses on green building certification standards (LEED/GRIHA), passive cooling architecture, building energy simulations, and sustainable HVAC integration.

title: IIA STUDENT CHAPTER
shortDesc: Indian Institute of Architects chapter fostering design excellence, urban planning, and heritage care.
longDesc: IIA Student Chapter under Architecture connects students with practicing architects, architectural design competitions, urban planning forums, and building conservation workshops.

title: COUNCIL OF ARCHITECTURE
shortDesc: Promoting professional architectural ethics, building codes, and architectural practice standards.
longDesc: Council of Architecture Chapter under Architecture emphasizes professional practice ethics, National Building Code (NBC) compliance, architectural documentation, and legal regulations in construction.

title: ENGLISH LANGUAGE TEACHERS' ASSOCIATION OF INDIA
shortDesc: ELTAI chapter enhancing English language pedagogy, linguistics, and professional communication.
longDesc: ELTAI Student Chapter under UILAH focuses on English language teaching methodologies, applied linguistics, public speaking, academic writing, and cross-cultural communication skills.

title: ASIFA India
shortDesc: International Animated Film Association chapter celebrating animation arts, VFX, and digital storytelling.
longDesc: ASIFA India Chapter under Animation promotes international animation culture, 2D/3D animation masterclasses, visual effects breakdowns, character rigging workshops, and film festival screenings.

title: PATA INDIA CHANDIGARH UNIVERSITY STUDENT CHAPTER
shortDesc: Pacific Asia Travel Association chapter advancing sustainable tourism, destination branding, and travel insights.
longDesc: PATA Student Chapter under Tourism & Hospitality Management connects students to global travel networks, sustainable tourism marketing, destination branding campaigns, and hospitality insights.

title: IEEE PRAKASH BHARTI SCHOLAR CHAPTER CHANDIGARH UNIVERSITY (IEEE PBSC CU)
shortDesc: Optics, photonics, laser physics, fiber optic communications, and optical sensor research.
longDesc: IEEE PBSC Chapter under Physics focuses on optical physics, laser technology applications, fiber optic data transmission, nanophotonics, and experimental optical sensor research.

title: AMERICAN CHEMICAL SOCIETY-INTERNATIONAL STUDENT CHAPTER (ACS-ISC)
shortDesc: ACS chapter promoting chemical science research, green chemistry, and lab safety outreach.
longDesc: ACS Student Chapter under Chemistry connects students with global chemical science networks, green chemistry experiments, industrial chemical safety drives, and chemistry outreach in schools.

title: IEEE PHOTONICS SOCIETY
shortDesc: Quantum photonics, semiconductor lasers, biophotonics, and optical device engineering.
longDesc: IEEE Photonics Society Chapter under Physics explores lightwave technology, semiconductor laser diodes, quantum optical computing, biophotonic imaging, and optoelectronic devices.

title: IEEE Information Theory society
shortDesc: Data compression, cryptography, error-correcting codes, and mathematical communications theory.
longDesc: IEEE Information Theory Society Chapter under Mathematics investigates channel coding theorems, data encryption algorithms, information entropy, signal processing math, and error-correcting codes.
